title: Prompt hardening for Fable 5
goal: Skill bodies in src/install/commands.ts and session prompts in src/prompts/sessionContext.ts explicitly require printing command output verbatim in the final message (no summarizing) and ending the turn after asking the user (no --apply in the same turn); covered by updated snapshot tests.

steps.title: Shared hardened hint constants
steps.detail: New module src/prompts/sessionHints.ts exporting VERBATIM_OUTPUT_HINT (print the complete command output verbatim in the final message; the user does not read the Bash tool result) and ASK_AND_STOP_HINT (ask, then end your turn; never run --apply in the same turn as the question); importable from src/prompts and src/install.

steps.title: Harden session prompts in sessionContext.ts
steps.detail: next/plan/project/decision/done/verify prompts: every show/ask instruction gets explicit end-the-turn wording and a ban on running mini ... --apply in the same turn as the question, using the shared hints.

steps.title: Harden skill bodies in commands.ts
steps.detail: status/doctor/changelog/map/audit/model/todo/init/undo/upgrade/import-gsd bodies: replace soft relay/summarize phrasing with verbatim-output wording; confirmation steps (undo, upgrade, import-gsd, init overwrite) get explicit end-your-turn-and-wait wording.

steps.title: Update snapshot tests
steps.detail: Regenerate prompt snapshots (vitest -u) and review diffs: wording changes only, no structural changes to the prompts.

steps.title: Green plus reinstall
steps.detail: npm test and npm run build pass; npm run install-local refreshes the hardened .md files into ~/.claude/commands/mini/.

resolvedVerify: Fable 5 actually prints overviews and stops on questions in a fresh session
